# Upstream: mattpocock/skills

- **Repo:** https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
- **Pinned:** 2026-05-31
- **Install:** `npx skills add https://github.com/mattpocock/skills --skill <name>`

Skills in this bundle: `grill-with-docs`, `handoff`, `write-a-skill`

Refresh procedure:

1. Run `npx skills add` for the skill(s) you want to update
2. Diff against `vendor/skills/mattpocock/<name>/`
3. Copy intentional changes; update pinned date in this file
